title: Boundaries: Mini Lesson
description: Branching checks to reinforce conceptual boundaries.

blocks.correct_html: Correct. Outputs match for all valid inputs.
blocks.incorrect_html: Not quite. Equivalent forms can look very different.
blocks.rejoin_html: Now move to the next boundary question.

blocks.html: Keep going. Focus on definitions, not surface form.

blocks.question_html: If two expressions have different domains, can they be equivalent everywhere?
